subparts.text: Distinguish between structured and unstructured data. 2.5
Can you list down examples of Big Data in present scenario? 2.5
Why we need Distributed File System? 2.5
Do we need specific computational architecture for distributed big data paradigm? Justify your answer. 2.5
Can you differentiate between a job and workflow? 2.5
Explain the terms Data as a resource and ethics for data in Big Data paradigm. 2.5
What is unique about Unique ID in MongoDB? 2.5
How Apache Pig - Grunt Shell differs from normal OS shells? 2.5

questions.question_text: Following Examples of Big Data in Various Domains may be explained: a. Healthcare b. Algorithmic Trading c. Medicine d. Web Analytics
What are Key Properties of CAP Theorem and tradeoff in Big Data System given CAP? How Bloom Filters acts in Big Data paradigms?
How Hadoop architecture matches the requirements of Big Data Analysis? Given HDFS, explain Name Node and Data Node Daemons in HDFS.

a. Explain PIG as a language for Information extraction from databases and HIVE as a report generator in distributed databases. b. How Data integrity, compression, I/O and serialization in HDFS meets map- reduce algorithmic requirements?

a. Given Map-reduce, How YARN fulfills the resource manager roles and performs Job shuffling, scheduling and sorting? b. Also explain MemCached functions in holding the results of API calls, Database Calls and page rendering etc.
a. How Zookeeper ensures coordination among cloud applications? b. Explain the functionality of Tokyo Cabinet as Database of Databases.
How HIVE works on top of Map reduce and Supports SQL like environment through Definitions, Manipulations and Queries?
Write short notes on the following with at least application as context: a. NewSQL b. NuoSQL
